LONG NAME: CLM_SUBSCR_USPS_STATE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs)

AE = Armed Forces, Europe/Middle 
East/Africa/Canada 
AK = Alaska
